title: Hans Burkhardt oral history transcript
creator: Burkhardt, Hans Gustav, 1904- interviewee

description: Transcript of a four-hour interview completed under the auspices of the UCLA Oral History Program
Burkhardt discusses training with Arshile Gorky, his friend Mark Tobey, and how his stays in Mexico and political concerns influenced his abstract painting
The Bancroft Library, University of California, Berkeley
